description: CompositionLavender strappy top made of 100% cotton, with adjustable shoulder strapsFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this top with its plush fabric. The subtle colour adds an interesting dimension to this basic top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute, a jacket and a  vibrant scarf.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
